behaviors.description: Block storing a PASS summary when any stored dimension finding in the same round is FAIL.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is module handoff between summary-write path and stored findings lookup for the same round (MOCK-MISS). No real OS/network/subprocess is required (REAL-INFRA no), and no AI output quality is required (LLM-DEP no). Unit is too low because a pure function test would miss wrong repository query/wiring across modules.
behaviors.test_description: Wire summary service + findings repository against a local test DB; seed one FAIL finding for round R; attempt to persist PASS summary for R; assert write is rejected and error references conflicting stored verdict.

behaviors.description: Compute stop-gate verdict from stored per-dimension findings, not only hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module data-source correctness in gate computation (MOCK-MISS). Need real wiring between gate logic and persistence, but not real OS/network/subprocess (REAL-INFRA no) and not model output quality (LLM-DEP no). Rejected Unit because behavior explicitly requires reading stored findings, not just parsing summary text.
behaviors.test_description: Set inconsistent inputs in local DB: summary text says PASS while stored finding includes FAIL; run gate computation; assert final verdict is non-PASS based on stored findings.

behaviors.description: Require explicit override flag for manual summary overrides and emit auditable warning.
behaviors.justification: Behavior spans request handling + policy check + audit record persistence, so module interaction is the failure boundary (MOCK-MISS). No requirement for real subprocess/network/OS primitives (REAL-INFRA no), and no AI judgment dependency (LLM-DEP no). Rejected System because behavior text only requires auditable warning record, which local in-process persistence can validate.
behaviors.test_description: Call override endpoint/service without flag and with flag using local persistence; assert first is rejected, second succeeds, and audit warning row/event is recorded with actor, reason, and timestamp.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, PASS requires a review round identifier generated after the latest fix commit.
behaviors.justification: Failure is ordering/state linkage across fix-tracking and review-round metadata modules (MOCK-MISS). Real OS/subprocess git interaction is not explicitly required by behavior text; commit/round metadata comparison can be validated in-process (REAL-INFRA no). No AI output-quality dependency (LLM-DEP no). Rejected System because behavior does not require exercising real git commands, only post-fix round linkage semantics.
behaviors.test_description: Seed local state with latest fix commit C2 and review round IDs mapped to commits; assert PASS blocked when latest round is tied to C1<C2 and allowed only when round is tied to commit after/at C2 per policy.

behaviors.description: In live review loop, PASS cannot finalize unless a fresh review-agent round runs on updated diff.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a real review-agent run in the live loop; a stub can falsely pass freshness checks while hiding failures tied to actual agent execution on updated diff context (MOCK-HIDE, LLM-DEP yes by execution path). Not Workflow because text requires one fresh round gate before finalize, not multiple agentic decisions chained as the assertion target. Rejected Integration because behavior text says 'live review loop' and 'fresh review-agent round runs,' which disqualifies pure in-process fake-only validation.
behaviors.test_description: Run end-to-end review loop against real agent call for a changed diff; attempt finalize without new round and assert block; trigger real fresh round on updated diff and assert finalize gate can proceed only after that round is recorded.

behaviors.description: If rounds are exhausted and stored MUST-FIX findings remain unresolved, outcome is escalation (not PASS).
behaviors.justification: This is policy computation over persisted round/finding state across modules (MOCK-MISS). No real OS/network/subprocess requirement (REAL-INFRA no), and no dependence on model output quality for this decision once stored results exist (LLM-DEP no). Rejected Unit because exhaustion state + unresolved findings typically come from separate stores/services and handoff bugs are the real risk.
behaviors.test_description: Populate local DB with max-rounds reached and unresolved MUST-FIX findings; execute outcome resolver; assert escalation status and explicit non-PASS verdict.

behaviors.description: In a live multi-round review workflow, exhausted rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings still block PASS and emit escalation.
behaviors.justification: Behavior targets full multi-round live pipeline semantics with sequenced review rounds and terminal gating/escalation, i.e., multiple agentic steps plus orchestration correctness (MULTI-STEP yes). A lower-level test can miss cross-round state carryover/order bugs that appear only across the full loop (MOCK-HIDE). Rejected Agentic because text explicitly requires 'live multi-round review workflow' (plural rounds/sequence), which disqualifies single-step agentic scope.
behaviors.test_description: Execute live pipeline across multiple real review rounds until configured exhaustion with MUST-FIX unresolved; assert finalization remains blocked and escalation artifact/event is emitted at terminal step.
